title: smilax oldhamii var. higoensis
intro: Smilax oldhamii var. higoensis is a variety of the Smilax oldhamii plant, a type of climbing vine native to East Asia, characterized by its woody stems and dark green leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Smilax oldhamii var. higoensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a component of traditional medicine formulas.
